gh_b2ddfc0dac455051f7864129.title: 全遠端後端工程師職缺 Fully remote contractor backend engineer
gh_b2ddfc0dac455051f7864129.description:
**熱騰騰遠端新職缺**👋
加拿大SaaS新創，尋找全遠端資深後端工程師 ，熟悉 JavaScript, Nest.js, Postgre, Kubernetes/Docker, AWS (EKS, RDS, VPC), 及 Terraform等。熟悉CI/CD 以及 Infrastructure as Code (IaC) 佳。這是 #接案 性質工作，月薪USD$4.5k-5.5k，每週工時約25-30小時。邏輯思維/溝通能力強。英文需可與外國工程師/主管工作上溝通。自由安排工作規劃。

**New Contractor Vacancy Open**👋 
Calling for experienced hashtag#backend professionals with strong #JavaScript #Nest.js #Kubernetes #Docker #AWS #Terraform proficiency. Experienced with #CI/CD Pipelines and #InfrastructureasCode #IaC
This #Contractor position is open only in #Taiwan for a Canadian SaaS startup in the home industry. It provides an autonomous working schedule, flexible working hours, and fully remote work mode. The monthly salary is between USD$4.5k-5.5k with 20-30 work hours per week.

Key qualifications:
📌Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related STEM majors, advanced degree is preferred.
📌At least 5 years of experience in Backend Engineering or Full Stack role with strong proficiency in JavaScript, Nest.js, Kubernetes/Docker, Terraform, and Postgre
📌Experienced with CI/CD Pipelines and Infrastructure as Code
📌Strong communication skills in English (verbal/written)
📌Citizen or Permanent Resident of Taiwan

應徵連結與公司資訊如下：Please apply via the link below and inbox me for further details!
https://app.worca.io/jobs/23c913b5-8e4a-40a2-a010-013c19c51a53

gh_b25d50b22a63ca6c3f5b072d.title: [Curitiba] Front-end Developer na Robô Laura
gh_b25d50b22a63ca6c3f5b072d.description:
## Descrição da vaga

Se você busca atuar em produtos que impactam a vida das pessoas, e cujo propósito é auxiliar a salvar vidas, temos uma vaga que pode ser do seu interesse.

Buscamos front end developer que ame reproduzir protótipos de alta fidelidade em código, que pense fora da caixa e preze pela experiência do usuário. Aqui valorizamos a colaboração e a participação nos processos de desenvolvimento, com questionamentos e sugestões de melhorias.

## Local

Anywhere office

## Benefícios

- Descanso remunerado;
- Bonificação anual; 
- Anywhere office; 
- Laura Care; 
- Gympass; 
- Auxílio remoto - Cartão Caju; 
- Auxílio alimentação/refeição - Cartão Caju.

#### Diferenciais

- Oportunidade de trabalhar em uma das 100 startups to watch do Brasil, com crescimento de 250% no último ano; 
- Vivência com um time multidisciplinar: profissionais da área da saúde, engenharia, tecnologia, inovação e muito mais; 
- Trabalhar em um local que valoriza a discussão em grupo, troca e compartilhamento de informações;
- Ambiente de aprendizado e desenvolvimento contínuo, com flexibilidade e pessoas incríveis.
## Requisitos

**Obrigatórios:**
- ECMAScript 6 ou superior
- Sólida experiência em React e seu ecossistema (hooks, redux, styled components, etc)
- Domínio de HTML e CSS
- Padrões de API (RESTful ou GraphQL)
- Experiência com controle de versão (Git, Mercurial, etc)
- Experiência com serviços em nuvem (Azure, AWS, Google Cloud, etc)
- Experiência com ferramentas de CI/CD (Github Actions, CodeCircle, etc)
- Docker

**Desejáveis:**
- Animações CSS e JS
- TypeScript
- Experiência com alguma biblioteca UI (material-ui, bootstrap, tailwind)
- Ferramentas de código (Eslint, Husky, Prettier, Webpack, Babel, etc)
- Websockets

## Contratação

PJ a combinar

## Nossa empresa

Nosso objetivo é democratizar o acesso à saúde através da tecnologia para ajudar a salvar vidas. 🧡

Em maio de 2010, após perder sua filha para uma doença chamada SEPSE, foi que Jac Fressatto criou a Robô Laura. Através do uso da nossa tecnologia, ajudamos entidades a tomarem decisões mais assertivas, salvar vidas e gerar economia de custos. A Robô Laura já ajuda a salvar pelo menos 18 vidas por dia e já passamos a marca de 8 milhões de atendimentos realizados.

## Como se candidatar

Por favor, envie um email para camila.souza@laura-br.com com link do LinkedIn ou currículo e telefone para contato, assunto: Front-end Developer

## Labels

- 🏢 Flexível
- 🏢 Remoto
- 👴 Sênior
- ⚖️ PJ
- 💰 5k-10k

gh_b24f9f9a53e19665365de4e3.title: 8 Bit Rockstars - Senior Front End Developer - Saigon - FT
gh_b24f9f9a53e19665365de4e3.description:
![8BR](http://8bitrockr.com/img/logo_w.png)
#8 BIT ROCKSTARS

Floor 8th, Vincom B, 72 Le Thanh Ton, Ben Nghe Ward, Dist.1, HCMC
http://8bitrockr.com/
hr@8bitrockr.com
#### Salary: Up to 2.000 USD /month

Email CV to: **_hr@8bitrockr.com_**
## Salary

_Up to 2000 USD/month_
## Job Description

We are looking for people who can work well independently and love to be part of a team. 

You will be working with international clients on very interesting products. This is not the standard corporate website job but high load, complex projects which require dedication, skill and that you put your heart into the job. This is an excellent opportunity to gain experience, deliver happiness, and push your technical boundaries.
## Requirement
- Positive attitude, responsible and ability to learn.
- Strong English skills
- **4+ year experience in front-end technologies**
- **Proficient at Javascript library and framework (React / Angular / Ember / Backbone, or jQuery)**
- Excellent at HTML5, CSS3 (with LESS/SASS and frameworks like Bootstrap)
- Knowledgeable of cross-browser compatibility issues and solutions
- Experience with Git
- Strong teamwork, good leadership skills and attention to details
- Understanding of continuous integration, SCRUM
### Big Plus
- Good understanding of SEO principles
- Coding conventions
- CMS (Drupal / Wordpress)
- Restful APIs
## Benefits:
### What We Can Offer
- Oportunity to grow and learn from other talented individuals. 
- Opportunities to work with International Experts and cool startup entrepreneurs
- Work as a member in fun, fast-paced, and friendly team
- Very fun and friendly colleagues, global and professional working environment
- Modern office in District 1 with entertainment zone, relax area, coffee bar, etc.
### Benefits include:
- Open and honest culture where people are valued, treated fairly, trusted and empowered to do great things
- Attractive, **competitive salary** and incentives
- Year end **bonus** (13th month salary ++)
- 40 hour work weeks (9:00-18:00, Mon-Fri)
- **15 days** of vacation per year
- **Probation** with **100% of salary**
- Performance and **salary review** every **6 months**
- **International Medical Insurance** will be paid by the company
- **English Class** with foreigner 3 times a week.
- New **Technologies Club** every week
- Quarterly **rockstar Hackathon** with the Best prizes
- Short and long-term **international training** / work
- **Company trip** (local or internationally) every year
- **Team building events**, party monthly and much more
- **Entertainment Zone** for all members with full media in company (game, music, TV…).
- Enjoy **Relax and Coffee Bar** in company.

Send us your CV at: **_hr@8bitrockr.com_** and we will call you ASAP!
